name: golang-github-valyala-bytebufferpool-dev
title: golang-github-valyala-bytebufferpool-dev
summary: anti-memory-waste byte buffer pool for Go
description:
anti-memory-waste byte buffer pool for Go
An implementation of a pool of byte buffers with anti-memory-waste
protection.
.
The pool may waste limited amount of memory due to fragmentation.
This amount equals to the maximum total size of the byte buffers in
concurrent use.  Benchmark results Currently bytebufferpool is fastest
and most effective buffer pool written in Go.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-valyala-bytebufferpool-dev because anti-memory-waste byte buffer pool for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-valyala-bytebufferpool-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-valyala-bytebufferpool-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-valyala-bytebufferpool-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
